---
title: "Julie Lowndes' Greg Leptoukh Lecture Reprise"
description: "Forking as a Worldview: How Openscapes uses the open source concept of copy-modify to support researchers & shift culture in science"
author:
  - name: Openscapes
date: 2026-03-19
categories:
  - event 
  - nasa-framework
  - noaa-fisheries
image: leptoukh-receiving-award.jpg
---

*Cross-posted at* [openscapes.org/events](https://openscapes.org/blog)*, [nmfs-openscapes.github.io/blog](https://nmfs-openscapes.github.io/blog)*, [*nasa-openscapes.github.io/news*](https://nasa-openscapes.github.io/news.html).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

At the AGU 2025 Fall Meeting Julie Lowndes, Openscapes founding director, received the [AGU Greg Leptoukh Lecture Award](https://www.agu.org/honors/leptoukh). This award celebrates the life of an inspiring Earth scientist in our community and recognizes significant contributions to informatics, computational, or data sciences through research, education, and related activities.

We're lucky that Julie will give her talk again so we can all tune in. It will be recorded.

Details with the official AGU citation, her abstract, and slides are [posted](https://openscapes.org/blog/2026-01-15-agu-leptoukh-award-julie-lowndes/).

\
**When:** Mar 19, 2026 01:00 PM Eastern Time (US and Canada)\
Join Zoom Meeting: <https://agu.zoom.us/j/99945375572?pwd=sdDH5cy8uvnwy5DaTub1MkJdNjdkI9.1>\
Meeting ID: 999 4537 5572\
Passcode: kh#dP562

One tap mobile\
+16465588656,,99945375572#,,,,\*86748094# US (New York)\
+16469313860,,99945375572#,,,,\*86748094# US

::: {style="text-align:center;"}
![Aaron Friesz, Amy Steiker, Sudhir Shrestha, Julie Lowndes, Danie Kinkade, Alex Lewandowski, Luis Lopez as Julie receives Leptoukh Award, AGU 2025.](leptoukh-receiving-award.jpg){fig-alt="6 women and men smiling, wearing conference lanyards, standing in front of a large screen projecting a headshot of Julie Lowndes and her talk title Forking as a worldview: How Openscapes uses the open source concept of copy-modify to support researchers & shift culture in science" fig-align="center" width="70%"}
:::

![](logos-esa-openscapes.png){width="80%"}
